name: mcp-server-aws-documentation
description: AWS documentation access with search, content recommendations, and markdown conversion

rating.reason: Excellent documentation quality across all tools. Names are specific and clearly indicate purpose (read_documentation, search_documentation, recommend). Descriptions are comprehensive with detailed usage sections, clear explanations of functionality, specific examples, and practical guidance including when to use each tool and how to interpret results. Parameter documentation is thorough with clear descriptions, appropriate constraints, and helpful context. The documentation proactively addresses user questions about URL requirements, output formats, handling long documents, search strategies, and recommendation types.
